# Titanomagnetite

**Summary**: A magnetic mineral in the titanomagnetite series.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] investigated titanium-bearing magnetite to understand its role as a carrier of NRM.

## Scientific Context

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] Primary carrier of remanent magnetization in basaltic rocks.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] Microscopic examination and oxidation stage classification.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Titanomagnetite minerals are important as the carriers of NRM in igneous rocks. ([[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993, p. 82]])
